name: Checkbox
description: Machine-driven checkbox web component with checked, unchecked, and optional indeterminate states.
whenToUse: Binary yes/no choices, or selecting multiple items from a list.
avoidWhen: Mutually exclusive options - use RadioGroup. On/off toggle - consider Switch.

indeterminate.description: Initial mixed state. First user toggle resolves to checked.

aria-label.description: Accessible label when no visible text label is provided.

name.description: Form field name forwarded to the internal input control.

examples.title: States
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
  <sg-checkbox aria-label="Unchecked"></sg-checkbox>
  <sg-checkbox checked aria-label="Checked"></sg-checkbox>
  <sg-checkbox indeterminate aria-label="Indeterminate"></sg-checkbox>
  <sg-checkbox disabled aria-label="Disabled"></sg-checkbox>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: With Labels
Custom Label Content
Form Association
